title: Property Consultant - Ramky Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Ramky Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
